This is the weekly visible open thread. Post about anything you want, ask random questions, whatever. ACX has an unofficial subreddit [ https://substack.com/redirect/b5b7b0e7-d693-4fbc-9272-9c149bf40cd4?j=eyJ1IjoiOG81NG4ifQ.6oeetudtJEh-zO1onUJvtadWEdbodFIw0h4xbugrh1o ], Discord [ https://substack.com/redirect/0a973f65-2132-41a4-a8f5-0898df441408?j=eyJ1IjoiOG81NG4ifQ.6oeetudtJEh-zO1onUJvtadWEdbodFIw0h4xbugrh1o ], and bulletin board [ https://substack.com/redirect/0bae61bf-769a-451d-92c7-007228b651f6?j=eyJ1IjoiOG81NG4ifQ.6oeetudtJEh-zO1onUJvtadWEdbodFIw0h4xbugrh1o ], and in-person meetups around the world [ https://substack.com/redirect/3055b72d-b75f-4e20-8806-49b1d9b4c967?j=eyJ1IjoiOG81NG4ifQ.6oeetudtJEh-zO1onUJvtadWEdbodFIw0h4xbugrh1o ]. 95% of content is free, but for the remaining 5% you can subscribe here [ https://substack.com/redirect/ed349e0b-8605-4e6b-a5c2-c5ffdf002733?j=eyJ1IjoiOG81NG4ifQ.6oeetudtJEh-zO1onUJvtadWEdbodFIw0h4xbugrh1o ].
